[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010110 4
1 10001110 4
2 00001001 2
3 10101101 5
4 01000101 3
5 01001010 3
6 11001111 6
7 01001100 3

70 07 01000000 1
